findings.message: PII (owner_email) logged to logger. The Item model explicitly marks owner_email as PII with comment 'do not include in logs or external responses', but post_item() logs it via log.info()
findings.suggestion: Remove owner_email from the log.info() call. Log only non-sensitive fields like item_id. Change line 47 to: log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id)
